senses.gloss: to help, to assist, to support
to conduct water into a river
to Christianize, to convert someone to Christianity

examples.text: كُلُّ مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ، فَأَبَوَاهُ يُهَوِّدَانِهِ أَوْ يُنَصِّرَانِهِ أَوْ يُمَجِّسَانِهِ
examples.english: Every newborn is born upon the fitra; its parents then Judaize or Christianize or Zoroastrianize it.

etymology.text: Denominal verb of نَصَارَى (naṣārā, “Christians”), as if from the root ن ص ر (n ṣ r) related to aiding or assisting.
